title: Overlay volume mount has incorrect permissions
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
The permissions of the overlay volume mount ('O' flag in the volume declaration) differs from the same mount without overlay
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Create a temporary directory to mount `mkdir tmp`

2. Run `podman run -ti -v $PWD/tmp:/tmp/test:O --rm busybox ls -l /tmp`

3. Run `podman run -ti -v $PWD/tmp:/tmp/test:ro --rm busybox ls -l /tmp`

4. Run `podman run -ti -v $PWD/tmp:/tmp/test:rw --rm busybox ls -l /tmp`

4. Compare results

**Describe the results you received:**
```bash
$ podman run -ti --rm -v $PWD/tmp:/tmp/test:O busybox ls -l /tmp
total 0
drwx------    3 root     root             6 Dec 22 07:12 test
$ podman run -ti --rm -v $PWD/tmp:/tmp/test:ro busybox ls -l /tmp
total 0
drwxrwxr-x    3 root     101             17 Dec 14 14:21 test
$ podman run -ti --rm -v $PWD/tmp:/tmp/test:rw busybox ls -l /tmp
total 0
drwxrwxr-x    3 root     101             17 Dec 14 14:21 test
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
The permissions on the mounted directory expected to be the same in all three cases

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Tested on both of rootfull and rootless podman

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
$ podman version
Version:      2.2.1
API Version:  2.1.0
Go Version:   go1.15.6
Git Commit:   a0d478edea7f775b7ce32f8eb1a01e75374486cb
Built:        Wed Dec  9 00:48:23 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
$ podman info --debug
host:
  arch: amd64
  buildahVersion: 1.18.0
  cgroupManager: cgroupfs

  conmon:
    package: Unknown

  cpus: 4

  eventLogger: journald
  hostname: xom-base
  idMappings:

    - container_id: 0

      size: 65536
    uidmap:

      host_id: 1002
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 265536
      size: 65536
  kernel: 5.9.14-arch1-1
  linkmode: dynamic
  memFree: 10677805056
  memTotal: 15653138432
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: Unknown
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0-rc92
      commit: ff819c7e9184c13b7c2607fe6c30ae19403a7aff

  os: linux

    path: /run/user/1002/podman/podman.sock

  slirp4netns:

    version: |-
      slirp4netns version 1.1.8
      commit: d361001f495417b880f20329121e3aa431a8f90f
      libslirp: 4.4.0
      SLIRP_CONFIG_VERSION_MAX: 3
      libseccomp: 2.5.1
  swapFree: 20480909312
  swapTotal: 20480909312
  uptime: 2h 24m 54.51s (Approximately 0.08 days)
registries:
  search:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - quay.io
  - registry.access.redhat.com

store:
  configFile: /home/dfomichev/.config/containers/storage.conf

    number: 15

  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions:

        FUSE library version 3.10.1
        using FUSE kernel interface version 7.31
  graphRoot: /home/dfomichev/.local/share/containers/storage
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
$ pacman -Qi podman

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Tested on Archlinux and CentOS 7

comments.body: Interested in opening a PR to fix this?
Well, I tried to find where the volume mounts are performed in the podman code, but (yet) did not succeed. I am not familiar with Go to be honest.

Still able to reproduce with podman 3.0.1

The provided fix does not change the situation, because the upper dir still has 0700 permissions and the fix seems to set the permissions according the upper dir instead of the lower dir.
Can we /reopen this issue or should I post a new one?
```bash
[root@host ~]# podman run -ti --rm -v $PWD/test_data:/t_ro:ro -v $PWD/test_data:/t_o:O -v $PWD/test_data:/t_rw:rw busybox
/ # ls -l
total 24
drwxr-xr-x    2 root     root         12288 Feb 18 00:41 bin
drwxr-xr-x    5 root     root           360 Mar  3 14:44 dev
drwxr-xr-x    1 root     root            70 Mar  3 14:44 etc
drwxr-xr-x    2 nobody   nobody          10 Feb 18 00:41 home
dr-xr-xr-x 1355 root     root             0 Mar  3 14:44 proc
drwx------    1 root     root            26 Mar  3 14:44 root
drwxr-xr-x    3 root     root            54 Mar  3 14:44 run
dr-xr-xr-x   13 root     root             0 Mar  3 14:21 sys
drwx------    1 root     root            10 Mar  3 14:44 t_o
drwxr-xr-x    2 root     root          4096 Dec 16 14:29 t_ro
drwxr-xr-x    2 root     root          4096 Dec 16 14:29 t_rw
drwxrwxrwt    2 root     root            10 Feb 18 00:41 tmp
drwxr-xr-x    3 root     root            26 Feb 18 00:41 usr
drwxr-xr-x    4 root     root            42 Feb 18 00:41 var
/ # mount | grep 'test_data'
/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/7dc0bbc37db43e4a0d1c90c42522c94326f0125b3e063dfc50f67cdb85179c93/userdata/overlay/046544982/merge on /t_o type overlay (rw,relatime,lowerdir=/root/test_data,upperdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/7dc0bbc37db43e4a0d1c90c42522c94326f0125b3e063dfc50f67cdb85179c93/userdata/overlay/046544982/upper,workdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/7dc0bbc37db43e4a0d1c90c42522c94326f0125b3e063dfc50f67cdb85179c93/userdata/overlay/046544982/work)

# In other terminal session
[root@host ~]# ls -l /root/ | grep test_data
drwxr-xr-x  2 root root      4096 Dec 16 17:29 test_data
[root@host ~]# ls -l /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/7dc0bbc37db43e4a0d1c90c42522c94326f0125b3e063dfc50f67cdb85179c93/userdata/overlay/046544982
total 0
drwx------ 2 root root 10 Mar  3 17:44 merge
drwx------ 2 root root 10 Mar  3 17:44 upper
drwx------ 3 root root 26 Mar  3 17:44 work
```
